{{Quote|Do it, Gil. You can't save me, and we shouldn't ''both'' die here. It's okay. Do it.|Captain Jared Cassel|<ref name="Legacy 4" />}}
'''Jared Cassel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] born on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] to a pro-[[Fel Empire|Imperial]] family. The brother of [[Gil Cassel]], Jared joined the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. Jared eventually reached the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and served in the [[908th Stormtrooper Division]], while Gil reached the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and served in the [[407th Stormtrooper Division]]. Seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the start of the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], the 908th defected from [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] and declared its loyalty to the deposed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] and his [[Empire-in-exile|Empire]], while the 407th remained loyal to [[Darth Krayt]].<ref name="Legacy 4" />

During the [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|Battle of Borosk]], Jared Cassel led the 908th against the 407th, commanded by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maleval]] and Jared's own brother. After the 407th's victory, Captain Cassel was spared from being killed and taken by Lord Maleval to be executed by Gil. Despite Jared trying to convince Gil to do it and save his own life, Gil refused, causing the Sith Lord to decapitate both of the Cassel brothers.<ref name="Legacy 4" />
